name: the-hot-zone
description: Richard Preston's The Hot Zone: The Terrifying True Story of the Origins of the Ebola Virus — a science thriller and pandemic preparedness toolkit about filoviruses (Ebola, Marburg), the Reston incident, Level 4 biosafety, and the hot zones where nature's deadliest pathogens cross into human populations.
useCase: Understand the emergence of filoviruses (Ebola, Marburg), how they kill, what Level 4 containment means, and how close we have already come to a devastating pandemic.
knownRisks: The book contains graphic medical descriptions that may be distressing or traumatic
Some details have been debated by scientists — Preston's narrative style prioritizes drama over dry accuracy
The book focuses on rare, dramatic viruses — the threat of more common diseases (malaria, tuberculosis) is far greater but less dramatic
